entity.summary: Professional trading interface within the broader Kraken exchange ecosystem, officially introduced on December 22, 2022 for advanced spot and derivatives-oriented trading workflows.
entity.notes: Kraken Pro is a product surface within Kraken rather than a separate legal exchange entity. The existing launch date is retained from Kraken's official December 22, 2022 introduction.

expected.summary: Professional trading surface within the broader Kraken exchange ecosystem.
expected.notes: Launch date updated from Kraken’s official announcement introducing Kraken Pro on 2022-12-22.

changes.summary: Professional trading interface within the broader Kraken exchange ecosystem, officially introduced on December 22, 2022 for advanced spot and derivatives-oriented trading workflows.
changes.notes: Kraken Pro is a product surface within Kraken rather than a separate legal exchange entity. The existing launch date is retained from Kraken's official December 22, 2022 introduction.

events.title: Kraken introduced Kraken Pro
events.description: Kraken officially introduced Kraken Pro as its professional trading interface on December 22, 2022.
events.notes: This is a product-surface launch within the existing Kraken exchange ecosystem.

evidence.title: Introducing Kraken Pro
evidence.notes: Kraken's official announcement establishes the product launch date.

evidence.title: Kraken Pro trading interface
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies current operation of the professional trading interface.
